daily_tips.tip: Drink at least 8 glasses of water daily to stay hydrated and support organ function.
Walk for at least 30 minutes daily. It reduces risk of heart disease, diabetes, and depression.
Include seasonal fruits and vegetables in your diet for natural vitamins and minerals.
Practice deep breathing for 5 minutes every morning to reduce stress and improve focus.
Wash your hands with soap for at least 20 seconds before eating and after using the restroom.
Limit screen time before bed. Blue light disrupts your sleep cycle.
Schedule annual health checkups including blood sugar, cholesterol, and blood pressure.
Cook in iron kadhai/vessels to naturally increase iron intake — especially important for women.
Apply sunscreen (SPF 30+) before going outdoors, even on cloudy days.
Eat curd (yogurt) daily for probiotics that support gut health and immunity.
Do not self-medicate with antibiotics. Antibiotic resistance is a growing crisis in India.
Keep your vaccination schedule up to date — for yourself and your children.
During monsoon season, ensure no stagnant water around your home to prevent dengue.
Turmeric milk (haldi doodh) before bed boosts immunity and has anti-inflammatory properties.
Mental health is health. Don't hesitate to speak to a counselor. Call iCall: 08046110007.
Avoid drinking water from unknown sources. Always carry your own filtered/boiled water.
Chew your food slowly — it improves digestion and helps you eat less.
Practice Surya Namaskar (Sun Salutation) — it's a complete body workout in just 12 poses.
If you smoke, seek help to quit. India offers free quit-line: 1800-11-2356.
Soak almonds overnight and eat them in the morning for brain health and energy.

Summer (March-June): 🌡️ Heat stroke risk is high. Stay indoors during 12-4 PM
🍋 Drink ORS, lemon water, or aam panna to prevent dehydration
🧴 Apply sunscreen and carry an umbrella when going out
Monsoon (July-September): 🦟 Peak season for Dengue, Malaria, and Chikungunya
🚰 Drink only boiled or filtered water
🦠 Avoid street food to prevent Typhoid and food poisoning
🏠 Remove stagnant water from coolers, pots, and tires
Winter (October-February): 🤧 Common cold and flu season — wash hands frequently
💨 Air pollution peaks — use N95 masks in Delhi NCR
🫁 Asthma patients should keep inhalers handy
🧣 Keep extremities warm to prevent hypothermia in North India
